## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**RTR_BARSTOCK** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (RAW_MATERIAL -> PART); ROUTER_HEADER (ROUTER -> ROUTER); UM_CODES (UM -> CODE); WORKCENTERS (WORKCENTER -> MACHINE)

**RTR_CUTLIST** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (COMPONENT->PART, PROPERTY_CODE->CODE_RM_SHAPE); JOB_HEADER (SCHEDULE_NO->JOB, SCHEDULE_SUFFIX->SUFFIX); JOB_OPERATIONS (SEQ -> SEQ); LOCATION_ADDRESS (LOCATION -> LOCN); RTR_CUTLIST_NOTES (CUTLIST_ITEM->ITEM, PART->PARENT); UM_CODES (EST_UM_UNITS->CODE, USQL_2ND_UM_UNITS->CODE); WORKCENTERS (NEXT_WORKCTR->MACHINE, WORKCENTER->MACHINE)

**RTR_CUTLIST_NOTES** -> RTR_CUTLIST (COMPONENT->COMPONENT, ITEM->CUTLIST_ITEM, PARENT->PART, WO->JOB, WO_SEQ->SEQ, WO_SUFFIX->SUFFIX)

**RTR_CUT_SHAPE** -> UM_CODES (EST_UM->CODE, USQL_2ND_UM->CODE)

**RTR_LINE_YIELD** -> ROUTER_SUPP_LINE (LINE->LINE, ROUTER->RTR_NUM); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**RTR_PRICE_1_4** -> ROUTER_HEADER (ROUTER -> ROUTER)

**RTR_PRICE_5_8** -> RTR_PRICE_1_4 (ROUTER -> ROUTER)

**RTR_PRICE_9_10** -> RTR_PRICE_1_4 (ROUTER -> ROUTER)

**RTR_REV_HIST** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); OP_CODES (LMO->LMO, OP_CODE->OPERATION); ROUTER_HEADER (ROUTER -> ROUTER); WORKCENTERS (WC -> MACHINE)

**RTR_REV_NOTES** -> ROUTER_HEADER (ROUTER -> ROUTER)

**RTR_SEQ_COMMENTS** -> ROUTER_SUPP_LINE (RTR_NUMBER->RTR_NUM, RTR_SEQ->LINE)

**RTR_SEQ_SPLIT_XREF** -> OP_CODES (LMO -> LMO)

**RTR_SORT_COMMENTS** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); ROUTER_HEADER (ROUTER -> ROUTER); ROUTER_LINE (SEQ -> LINE_ROUTER)
